---
name: "Srinivasan Ramachandra Sharma"
date: 2024-01-01
period: "MS: Spring 2024 – Summer 2025"
topic: "Compiler Transformations for Improving Branch Prediction"
website: "https://thesrsakabuvttchi.github.io/website/"
position: Qualcomm
publications:
  - venue: "ECOOP 2026"
    path: "publications/conference/2026ecoop.html"
---
